prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 上海外国语大学是 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名持续上升，2021 年第 93 名→2025 年第 82 名→2026 年第 81 名，近年排名稳步提升，学校综合实力和认可度增强；2026 年声誉评价为中性/混合；抖音热度排名第 49/106，评价为较热，短视频平台曝光度中等偏上，对报考关注度有一定正向作用。2022 年师德师风负面事件距今已较远，影响基本消退；外国语言文学为 A+ 学科（全国顶尖）。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 数据科学与大数据技术属于计算机/大数据方向，社会热度较高（计算机类 2024 年 ，推荐）；该专业为 2026 年新增招生方向，此前物理类仅招新闻传播学类，专业方向变化较大。青海省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 48000 人（数据标注不确定），按近年物理类占比约 64% 估算约 30720 人，较 2025 年物理类 30457 人略有增加，考生规模小幅上升。；上海外国语大学位于上海（东部沿海一线城市），对西部省份考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在青海省招生规模极小（2021 年 8 人，近年理科仅 2–4 人），招生人数微小变动即对位次产生显著影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 2696 名、2026 年计划扩招 1 人（+50%，竞争加剧）、学校软科排名持续上升（吸引力增强）、物理类考生规模略有增加、招生专业从新闻传播类调整为数据科学（热度更高）。考虑扩招幅度较大（+50%）是位次后移的主导因素，叠加考生规模略增、数据科学专业热度较高，在 base_rank 基础上小幅上调位次数字，预测 2026 年最低位次约 3525 名，区间 3025–4025 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were 872→1148→4968→2468→2696, showing an overall backward trend. In 2021–2022, it was around 1000. In 2023, due to adjustments in enrollment majors (only 3 majors), the ranking significantly shifted backward to 4968. In 2024, it rebounded to 2468 (only 1 major enrolling), and in 2025, it slightly decreased to 2696 (still only 1 major). In recent three years, rankings fluctuated between 2400–5000, with a baseline of about 2696 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan in Qinghai Province for Science/Physics Category: 2021–2023 all had 4 students, 2024–2025 reduced to 2 students; 2026 plan is 3 students, an increase of 1 student (+50%) compared to 2025. Expansion usually intensifies competition, leading to larger ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai International Studies University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science main ranking has been rising, from 93rd in 2021 to 82nd in 2025 to 81st in 2026, with steady improvement in recent years, enhancing overall strength and recognition; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed; Douyin heat ranking is 49/106, evaluated as relatively hot, with moderate to high exposure on short video platforms, positively influencing application interest. The 2022 negative incident regarding teacher ethics is now distant, with impact largely dissipated; Foreign Language and Literature is an A+ discipline (top in the country).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Data Science and Big Data Technology belongs to the Computer/Big Data direction, with high social popularity (Computer category in 2024, recommended); this major is a new enrollment direction in 2026, previously Physics Category only enrolled Journalism and Communication, with significant changes in major direction. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Qinghai Province is about 48,000 (data marked as uncertain), estimated at about 30,720 based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 64%, a slight increase from 30,457 in 2025, with a small rise in candidate scale. Shanghai International Studies University is located in Shanghai (eastern coastal first-tier city), with strong regional appeal to candidates from western provinces; its enrollment scale in Qinghai Province is very small (8 students in 2021, only 2–4 students in recent years for Science), so minor changes in enrollment numbers significantly impact rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 2696, the 2026 plan to expand by 1 student (+50%, intensifying competition), the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking (increased attractiveness), a slight increase in Physics Category candidate scale, and the adjustment of enrollment major from Journalism and Communication to Data Science (higher popularity). Considering the large expansion (+50%) as the dominant factor for ranking backward shift, along with a slight increase in candidate scale and high popularity of Data Science, the ranking number is slightly increased based on base_rank, predicting the 2026 minimum ranking to be about 3525, with a range of 3025–4025.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Physics Category has only one enrollment major, Data Science and Big Data Technology (plan 3 students), with no tier selection options. Rankings within the predicted range of 3025–4025 all have admission possibilities. It is recommended to fill this major as the only choice. This major is an emerging interdisciplinary direction, combining SISU's language advantages with data science skills, offering good employment prospects.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Arts/History were 273→267→312→1683→837, showing significant fluctuations. In 2021–2022, it stabilized around 270, rose slightly to 312 in 2023, dropped sharply to 1683 in 2024 (due to expansion to 6 students), and recovered to 837 in 2025 (returning to a plan of 6 students). Rankings have fluctuated dramatically in recent years, with a baseline ranking of approximately 837 in 2025. The enrollment plan for Arts/History in Qinghai Province: 4 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 6 in 2024–2025, and planned at 5 for 2026, a reduction of 1 student (-16.7%) compared to 2025. A reduction in enrollment typically eases competition slightly, leading to a decrease in ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai International Studies University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its ranking on the Soft Science main list has been steadily rising: 93rd in 2021 → 82nd in 2025 → 81st in 2026, indicating enhanced comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2026, its reputation is assessed as neutral/mixed (mainly involving management incidents like air conditioning fee disputes, with no significant negative public opinion). Its Douyin popularity ranks 49th out of 106, rated as relatively hot, with moderate to high exposure on short video platforms, positively influencing application interest. A negative incident regarding teacher ethics occurred in 2022, but it is now distant and its impact has largely faded. Foreign Language and Literature is an A+ discipline (top in the country), representing the university's core strength. Among the enrollment majors, English (Education) directly corresponds to the A+ Foreign Language and Literature, while Journalism and Communication, though not individually assessed, benefits from the university's language advantages. Business Administration has no A-level discipline assessment.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of foreign language majors has been generally cautious in recent years (2024), remaining stable overall. Journalism and Communication majors are notably discouraged by society (2024), but SISU's Journalism and Communication programs still have unique appeal due to language advantages. The total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Qinghai Province in 2026 is approximately 48,000 (data marked as uncertain). Based on the recent proportion of History students at about 36%, this estimates around 17,280 students, roughly consistent with the 17,212 History students in 2025, indicating no significant change in the candidate pool. Shanghai International Studies University is located in Shanghai (a first-tier eastern coastal city), which has strong regional appeal for students from western provinces. In 2021, the university enrolled 8 students in Qinghai (1.29% of its national total), making it a province with a small enrollment scale, where fluctuations in enrollment numbers have a sensitive impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 837, the 2026 enrollment reduction of 1 student (slightly easing competition), the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings (enhancing appeal), a neutral and stable reputation, and a stable candidate pool. Given that the competition-easing effect of the enrollment reduction slightly outweighs the competition-intensifying effect of the ranking rise, combined with stable popularity of foreign language majors and strong regional appeal, the ranking number is slightly lowered from the base_rank. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 738, with a range of 605–871.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 605–871, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 English (Education) as the main direction (backed by A+ discipline strength). Tier 1 Journalism and Communication can be a reach, while Tier 3 Business Administration serves as a safety option. If your ranking is better than the lower bound of the range (within 605), you can prioritize reaching for Tier 1 majors.
